hooks.command: jq -e 'if .file_path then (.file_path | test("src/lib/paraglide/")) else false end' && echo 'BLOCKED: src/lib/paraglide/ is auto-generated — edit src/lib/i18n/messages/*.json instead.' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0

FILE=$(jq -r '.file_path // empty'); case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.svelte|*.js|*.css) pnpm prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; *.rs) cd /home/wsmi/Documents/dev_projects/tau-term/src-tauri && cargo fmt 2>/dev/null ;; esac; exit 0
